textByHashes.d8a5af47d73fd345477cdca274cfbcc923536b2d: Don't think I've met you before. You here to buy?
textByHashes.af5e539befd728c968c22c26a12fec7caa6506b8: A dwarf has to make a living.
textByHashes.5be5903c6bf86550ecb96b5a305a93c063355ac8: To mine? Of course. Still, no harm in having multiple sources of income, is there?
textByHashes.8bf7412eb49f0fce894bbdfd41443c9c75151d6e: Exactly. So, what are you buying?
textByHashes.d626b1400ae5e30b70d45db61e8fd937acad265f: Does it have to mean anything?
textByHashes.22be85cc8fc6dfc4193355e66ff86849dacd1bc2: Alright then, riddle me this: Why are we here?
textByHashes.3e1cdfbdc86cdffe04c80dce91f2795a5c6544fd: I suppose it could be, but I was specifically referring to this place. Why are we here?
textByHashes.63f0a9d4fe1155277ddae2f655c02f34ba590ed4: So they say. Plenty of ore elsewhere though.
textByHashes.ec441dc87f335515a3126069a0420f73c77f6f14: Ah, but I can't answer that. Besides, even if I could, it would ruin the riddle. You'll just have to keep pondering it for yourself. Now, what are you buying?
